text:
is a single by Megumi Hayashibara. The single was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number KICM-2161 https://eeo.today/media/2024/10/21/177911/ , it was released on 18 December 2024. https://king-cr.jp/artist/hayashi/news/ It contains the theme song of the PACHINKO GODZILLA vs. EVANGELION: Second Impact G pachinko machine.
